_meta.scope: 8 canonical clean-text entries from curated group (curated-district-stories and curated-jerrywbrown). Sample of 26 total clean-text entries. Demonstrates audit pattern.
_meta.operation: ADD only. Never delete. Never edit existing entries. Each audit-add entry is a NEW companion resource paired with an existing clean-text entry by title and author.
_meta.merge_target: Insert each entries_to_add[] block after the corresponding existing entry within its category.entries[] array.
_meta.schema_compliance: Follows existing entry shape (title, author, url, format, grade, host, subject, optional notes). No new format slugs coined this batch.
_meta.bw_link_field: PENDING_SPEC. Architectural rule (BW beside ELA) requires either multi-subject support or a new bb_link field. Not coined here per no-naming. Saul to specify schema.
preferred_host_priority: 7. Teacher Weebly / classroom CMS (least stable but often best content)
_meta.rejected_hosts: TPT (paywalled), Course Hero (paywalled), Scribd (paywalled), TeachersPayTeachers, study.com paywall, low-quality blog spam, SEO-redirect domains.

entries_to_add.title: Rules of the Game (assignment with discussion questions and vocabulary)
entries_to_add.author: Amy Tan
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Full story embedded with pre-class discussion questions and integrated vocabulary list. Classroom-ready PDF.

entries_to_add.title: Rules of the Game (LitCharts free chapter analysis)
entries_to_add.author: Amy Tan
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Free chapter from the larger Joy Luck Club LitChart. Side-by-side summary plus theme tracking, character notes, literary devices.

entries_to_add.title: Flowers for Algernon (Louisiana DOE Grade 8 ELA full unit)
entries_to_add.author: Daniel Keyes
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: State-DOE four-week unit. Vocabulary, Cornell Notes graphic organizer for Charlie's cognitive arc, irony tracker, paired-text companions (What's in an Inkblot, The Story of Prometheus, Pandora myth), culminating writing task. Distinct from the existing Companion Resources entry which is the SPED adaptation.

entries_to_add._pairs_with: By the Waters of Babylon (Stephen Vincent Benét)
entries_to_add.title: By the Waters of Babylon (analysis worksheet with student-answered key)
entries_to_add.author: Stephen Vincent Benét
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Worksheet with conflict analysis, point-of-view, vocabulary decoding (Ou-dis-sun, UBTREAS, ASHING), and student paragraph response prompt. Free public access.

entries_to_add._pairs_with: The Cask of Amontillado (Edgar Allan Poe)
entries_to_add.title: The Cask of Amontillado (K20 Center 'Criminal Motivations' lesson)
entries_to_add.author: Edgar Allan Poe
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: University of Oklahoma K20 Center full lesson. Story plus brainstorm questions, vocabulary scaffold (Amontillado, nitre, Freemason), motivation analysis. Stable .ou.edu host.

entries_to_add._pairs_with: The Cask of Amontillado (Edgar Allan Poe)
entries_to_add.title: The Cask of Amontillado (Lit2Go USF text plus audio)
entries_to_add.author: Edgar Allan Poe
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: University of South Florida Lit2Go. Story plus embedded audio narration plus citation tools. ESL-friendly. Stable .edu host.

entries_to_add._pairs_with: The Cask of Amontillado (Edgar Allan Poe)
entries_to_add.title: The Cask of Amontillado (Manchester University lesson plan with vocabulary worksheet)
entries_to_add.author: Edgar Allan Poe
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Stephanie Hofer's lesson plan. Vocabulary worksheet (Amontillado, Catacomb, Impunity, Immolation), character notes, irony scaffold, comprehension prompts.

entries_to_add._pairs_with: All Summer in a Day (Ray Bradbury)
entries_to_add.title: All Summer in a Day (lesson plan with figurative language and vocabulary)
entries_to_add.author: Ray Bradbury
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Vocabulary terms chart, setting and character description prompts, simile/metaphor tracking chart, summary plus reaction-paragraph scaffold, theme exercise. Lesson is part of a dystopian-literature unit.

entries_to_add._pairs_with: All Summer in a Day (Ray Bradbury)
entries_to_add.title: All Summer in a Day (varsitytutors aggregated lesson plans)
entries_to_add.author: Ray Bradbury
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Aggregator of multiple free Bradbury lesson plans. Includes scaffolded read-alouds, three-letter perspective writing task (victim, bully, follower), bullying-and-consequences discussion guides, study-guide questions.

entries_to_add._pairs_with: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge (Ambrose Bierce)
entries_to_add.title: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge (K20 Center 'Mood and Tone' lesson)
entries_to_add.author: Ambrose Bierce
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: University of Oklahoma K20 Center full lesson. Mood-and-Tone handout, Why-Lighting strategy for highlighting tonal shifts, Think-Pair-Share Mary Poppins trailer comparison anchor, short-answer culminating prompt.

entries_to_add._pairs_with: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge (Ambrose Bierce)
entries_to_add.title: An Occurrence at Owl Creek Bridge (South Florida State College libguide)
entries_to_add.author: Ambrose Bierce
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Academic library guide. Curated scholarly criticism, dream-structure analysis, 1962 film adaptation reference, Short Stories for Students entry.

entries_to_add.title: Hills Like White Elephants (LitCharts free study guide)
entries_to_add.author: Ernest Hemingway
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Free LitChart. Theme tracking (communication, gender, choice), character analysis, symbol explanations (white elephants, train station, hills, drinks), historical context. CONTENT NOTE: story is widely read as depicting a couple discussing abortion. Grade 11-12 with teacher discretion.

entries_to_add.title: Hills Like White Elephants (SparkNotes free study guide)
entries_to_add.author: Ernest Hemingway
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Free study guide. Plot summary, character analysis of the American, important quotes by theme. Same content sensitivity as the LitCharts companion.

entries_to_add.title: Through the Tunnel (Loudoun County Public Schools vocab and study guide answer key)
entries_to_add.author: Doris Lessing
entries_to_add.subject: ela
entries_to_add.notes: Stable .lcps.org school district host. Vocabulary terms (contrition, frond, promontories, convulsive) plus study guide questions with reference page numbers. .docx format.
